name: Empty shelf blocks the order
description: IF the recognized shelf status is 'empty' THEN the order cannot be fulfilled and must be rejected.

actions.reason: Target shelf is empty; the ordered product is not on the shelf.

name: Flagged shelf recognition requires a human
description: IF shelf recognition flags manual review THEN the decision is delegated to a human operator.

actions.reason: Shelf-state recognition flagged the result for manual review.

name: Unknown shelf state requires a human
description: IF the recognized shelf status is 'unknown' THEN a human operator must confirm the shelf state before assignment.

actions.reason: Shelf state is unknown; a human must confirm the shelf before assignment.

name: Low-confidence recognition requires a human
description: IF the shelf-recognition confidence is below 0.60 THEN the prediction is not trusted automatically.

actions.reason: Shelf-recognition confidence is below the 0.60 trust threshold.

name: Only available robots may take orders
description: IF a robot status is not 'available' THEN the robot is excluded from candidate selection.

actions.reason: Robot is not available (busy, charging, failed, or in maintenance).

name: Low battery blocks assignment
description: IF a robot battery level is below 20 percent THEN the robot must charge instead of taking new orders.

actions.reason: Battery level is below the 20% safety threshold.

name: Payload capacity must cover the order weight
description: IF a robot maximum payload is lower than the order weight THEN the robot cannot carry the order.

actions.reason: Maximum payload capacity is below the order weight.

name: Overloaded robots are skipped
description: IF a robot already has 3 or more queued tasks THEN it must not receive additional orders.

actions.reason: Robot already has 3 or more queued tasks.

name: Urgent orders prioritize travel speed
description: IF the order priority is 'urgent' or 'high' THEN candidate ranking must weight travel distance more heavily.

name: High predicted load balances workload
description: IF the forecast load level is 'high' THEN candidate ranking must prefer robots with a low current workload.

name: High predicted load requires battery reserve
description: IF the forecast load level is 'high' AND a robot battery level is below 40 percent THEN the robot is kept in reserve for charging.

actions.reason: High predicted load requires at least 40% battery reserve.
